# Anton.Po - Senior Full Stack Software Architect

> Architecting The Next Web. 10+ Years Expertise in Clean Enterprise Architecture and High-Performance Web Stacks.

## Identity & Professional Mandate
Anton Postelniak is an elite Senior Full Stack Developer specializing in .NET 10 backend architecture and Angular 22 Server-Side Rendering (SSR). Operating at an enterprise tier, Anton engineers robust, scalable solutions designed for uncapped business scaling and measurable ROI. 

## Architectural & Engineering Baselines
All code and system designs adhere to the following strict paradigms:
- **Algorithmic Supremacy:** Strict $O(1)$ constant-time execution on critical data paths to eliminate system bottlenecks and reduce cloud infrastructure billing.
- **Backend Architecture:** Loosely coupled, zero-allocation C# .NET 10 architecture with rigorously optimized PostgreSQL deployments.
- **Frontend Architecture:** Zoneless Angular v22+, leveraging native Signal state flows and RxJS for pixel-perfect UI/UX. 
- **SEO & Delivery:** Predictable, transparent delivery backed by modern Angular SSR for instant search engine indexing and peak Core Web Vitals.

## Core Technology Stack
- **Frontend:** Angular v22, TypeScript, RxJS, High-Performance Canvas Animation
- **Backend:** C# / .NET 10, ASP.NET WebAPI, Entity Framework
- **Cloud & DevOps:** Azure, PostgreSQL, Hetzner, Cloudflare, CI/CD
- **AI Integration:** Dual MiniLM-L6-v2, ONNX Runtime, OpenRouter

## Key Case Studies & Impact
- **Aegitox (Founder/Architect):** Engineered a deterministic, hardware-accelerated .NET 10 AI inference pipeline executing in strict $O(1)$ time (2-12ms latency).
- **Enterprise CRM Transformation:** Upgraded legacy systems to modern Angular v22, accelerating release cadence from monthly to weekly.
- **Scalable Azure Platform:** Built a cost-efficient .NET 10/Azure backend supporting 3x user growth while reducing cloud costs by 30%.

- **Status:** Available for Enterprise Contracts
